infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: To let you take photos of incidents (for example, an accident scene or a fire) so you can attach them to an incident report and submit it in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: o let you pick existing photos from your library (for example, a photo of a hazard you already took) so you can attach them to an incident report and submit it in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To save images related to your reported incidents to your device (for example, a copy of the incident photo) so you can reference them later.
